name: Quarter Up Barcade
based_on: A retro arcade bar in the vein of Barcade (Brooklyn) and Ground Kontrol (Portland) — classic cabinets, craft beer on draft, weekly high-score tournaments, neon-and-CRT aesthetic.
summary: A neon barcade site whose hero is a playable retro mini-game (Breakout/Pong-style) with a live score, wrapped around real business content: games list, draft beer, events, and hours.
sections: Playable canvas hero mini-game with score and 'Press start' overlay
The cabinets — list of featured arcade games
On tap — rotating draft beer / cocktail list
Events — tournament nights and happy hour
Hours, location, age policy, and map
Footer with socials and private-event booking
setup_questions: What's the bar's name and era/theme (e.g. '80s arcade, all-neon')?
Name a few signature cabinets/games you have on the floor.
What are 4-6 drinks on your draft/cocktail list?
Address, weekly hours, and any recurring event night (e.g. 'Tuesday Tetris tournament')?
photo_terms: retro arcade bar neon glow cabinets row
vintage arcade machine joystick buttons close up
